info: Single Pixel2D phase plate (each pixel an independent, randomly initialized phase), sensor one focal length (50 mm) behind. Used by 1_design_diffraclens.py to optimize the on-axis PSF to focus on the sensor. 2500x2500 at 2 um pitch (5 mm aperture, f/10). The binding sampling constraint is lateral: the marginal-ray spatial frequency (D/2)/(lambda*f) ~= 91 cyc/mm stays well below the grid Nyquist 1/(2*ps) = 250 cyc/mm, so the full aperture can focus to a diffraction-limited spot (lambda*f/D ~= 5.5 um).
